title: elymus pendulinus
intro: Elymus pendulinus, also known as Pendulous Wild Rye, is a type of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues and digestive problems due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Elymus pendulinus include relieving symptoms of bronchitis, asthma, and allergies, as well as soothing digestive issues such as bloating and cramps. Elymus pendulinus can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in herbal remedies to support overall respiratory and digestive health.
